testcase.name: test_partner_cannot_access_user_without_submission

Daten","description":"Füllen Sie Ihre persönlichen Informationen aus","order":1,"step_type":"form","fields":[{"name":"name","field_type":"text","label":"Name","placeholder":"Ihr Nachname","required":true},{"name":"first_name","field_type":"text","label":"Vorname","placeholder":"Ihr Vorname","required":true},{"name":"phone","field_type":"phone","label":"Telefon","placeholder":"+49 (0) 123 456 789","required":true},{"name":"address","field_type":"text","label":"Adresse","placeholder":"Straße und Hausnummer","required":true},{"name":"field_of_study","field_type":"selectbox","label":"Fachgebiet","options":["Allgemeinmedizin","Zahnmedizin","HNO"],"required":true},{"name":"documents","field_type":"multiupload","label":"Dokumente","options":["Visum","Antrag auf Approbation","Approbation","Eingangsbescheinigung bei zuständiger Behörde","Kenntnissprüfung"],"required":false}],"required_fields":["name","first_name","phone","address","field_of_study"],"email_on_leave":true,"is_active":true,"created_at":"2026-04-14T13:07:30.369758+00:00","duration_unit":"days","duration_value":0,"id":"69de3c12faf9cbab373b72b1"},{"title":"Service Ihr Partner bearbeitet Ihren Antrag.","complete_message":"Alles erledigt! Sie können zum nächsten Schritt weitergehen.","email_on_leave":true,"is_active":true,"created_at":"2026-04-14T13:07:30.369778+00:00","duration_unit":"months","duration_value":3,"id":"69de3c12faf9cbab373b72b6"},{"title":"Service Weiterbildung","description":"Wählen Sie einen Partner für die Weiterbildung","order":7,"step_type":"partner_selection","fields":[],"filter_tag":"Weiterbildung","skippable":true,"skip_label":"Vorerst überspringen","is_active":true,"created_at":"2026-04-14T13:07:30.369780+00:00","duration_unit":"days","duration_value":0,"id":"69de3c12faf9cbab373b72b7"},{"title":"Meilenstein Job finden","description":"Hier können wir Ihnen helfen!","order":8,"step_type":"display","fields":[],"pending_message":"Hier können wir Ihnen helfen!","is_active":true,"created_at":"2026-04-14T13:07:30.369782+00:00","duration_unit":"weeks","duration_value":2,"id":"69de3c12faf9cbab373b72b8"}],"completion_pct":12} E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_partner_cannot_update_progress_for_non_submitted_user

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403, got 500: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 403 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_partner_api.py:191: in test_partner_cannot_update_progress_for_non_submitted_user assert response.status_code == 403, f"Expected 403, got {response.status_code}: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 403, got 500: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 403 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
